label: Generic article
opening_rule: First sentence: your sharpest claim about this subject -- not background, not context, not what it is.
closing_rule: Final paragraph: one concrete takeaway. No filler, no 'time will tell', no summary of what was already said.

sections.name: Introduction
sections.purpose: Hook and context. State what this is and why it matters -- from a specific angle, not generically.

sections.name: Main body
sections.purpose: Core information, facts, and analysis. Every paragraph must introduce a new argument or fact not covered elsewhere.

sections.name: Conclusion
sections.purpose: Verdict or takeaway. No filler phrases. State a position and defend it in 3-5 sentences. Do not restate what was already argued.
